content: **Alice:** #511 is already merged; I confirmed GitHub shows it merged at 2026-04-23T23:05:23Z. I also reviewed Dave's focused follow-up #518 this round; it was already merged by the time my merge command ran after verification.
**Ben:** Follow-up hardening is moving on top of the landed base. My #519 range-reference fix is merged, and I verified Dave's #518 quoted-reference rewrite fix after it landed.

**Carol:** Followed the range/clipboard/undo hardening direction with a small structural-reference fix PR: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/521. It prevents row/column delete rewrites from turning deleted references into generic `#ERR!`.

**Dave:** Ben's range #REF hardening PR #519 is merged. My quoted-reference structural rewrite PR #518 is also merged, so insert/delete formula reference correctness has two focused fixes on trunk now.

**Emma:** Extracted my work into narrow follow-up https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/520 after your base app landed. It keeps the merged base and adds only UI discoverability/polish: quick row/column/clear controls, selection status, and clearer active/range styling.
**Frank:** Followed the updated direction: closed duplicate PR #515 and opened focused PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/522 for persistence namespace/reload verification.
**Grace:** Per your guidance, I did not open another skeleton PR. I rechecked PR 516, confirmed it is now clean/mergeable, and reran E2E smoke coverage with agent-browser successfully.
